basket_summary.narrative: 31 of 44 symbols remain above the 200 SMA, 24 are above the 50 SMA, and 33 have RSI above 50. 5 have just reclaimed the 20 EMA, while 0 pass the full first-pass screen. That gives you a tighter shortlist than using moving averages alone.

symbols.notes: Current open holdings have an average purchase price of 16392. stop loss set at 23500
symbols.story: ABG.JO still has a supportive longer-term structure, but the stock is in a pullback or repair phase rather than a clean upswing. Momentum is constructive and volume confirmation is light. MACD is confirming improving momentum.
symbols.caution: If the pullback continues and the 200 SMA breaks, the bigger-picture read worsens materially.
symbols.strengthen_next: Reclaim the 20 EMA first, then the 50 SMA.
symbols.weaken_next: Stay pinned under the 20 EMA and drift down toward the 200 SMA.

symbols.notes: Current open holdings have an average purchase price of 3312. Trimmed position by 50%

symbols.story: ART.JO has mixed evidence across the trend layers, so the setup is not decisive yet. Momentum is constructive and volume confirmation is light. MACD is confirming improving momentum.

symbols.story: AVI.JO is operating below its long-term trend line, so the chart is in repair mode rather than in a healthy trend. Momentum is weak. MACD is still leaning bearish, so momentum repair is incomplete.
symbols.caution: A cheap-looking price is not the same thing as a healthy setup.
symbols.strengthen_next: Get back above the 20 EMA, then the 50 SMA, and eventually reclaim the 200 SMA.
symbols.weaken_next: Fail every bounce under the 20 EMA or continue printing lower prices under the 50 SMA.
